memoryArtifacts.headline: b Correspondence-Murial Tonkin to Richard Stringham, 30 Jul 1968
memoryArtifacts.description:
Murial Tonkin [etc.]-papers in a black binder in a box from the files of Richard B. Stringham, architect. Over the years, he has spent considerable time and expense researching the Stringham family. These documents are used with his permission.

Please note: In Great Britain, the surnames Tringham and Stringham are often used interchangeably, especially before 1750. For that reason, the two surnames have been combined for many individuals (especially for Stringham) as follows, “Tringham or Stringham”; with Tringham being first, as that spelling seems to occur more often. Names after 1750 are left as they are found in the record and are not combined. This is being done even if no switching back and forth is evident in available records because it will help when searching for individuals during that period and hopefully will reduce duplicate entries.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire於1435年8月1日出生在英國賀福爾波吉爾時，他的父親John Milbourne32歲，母親Elizabeth Anne Devereux23歲。他於1460年與Jane Baskerville在英國賀福爾特尼--也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年8月14日在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾波吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire于1435年8月1日出生在英国賀福爾波吉爾时，他的父亲John Milbourne32岁，母亲Elizabeth Anne Devereux23岁。他于1460年与Jane Baskerville在英国賀福爾特尼--也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年8月14日在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾波吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire was born on 1 August 1435, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, his father, John Milbourne, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, was 23. He married Jane Baskerville in 1460, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 12 daughters. He died on 14 August 1522, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Burghill, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire est né le 1 août 1435, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Milbourne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jane Baskerville en 1460, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire am 1. August 1435 in Burghill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Milbourne 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Anne Devereux 23. Er hat 1460 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England Jane Baskerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1522 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Burghill, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire è nato il il 1 agosto 1435 nel Burghill, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, John Milbourne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Jane Baskerville nel 1460, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Burghill, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshireが1435年8月1日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで生まれた時，父John Milbourneは32歳，母Elizabeth Anne Devereuxは23歳であった。1460年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイでJane Baskervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年8月14日に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire(이)가 1435년 8월 1일 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Milbourne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Anne Devereux(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 Jane Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 8월 14일 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에 묻혔다.

pt.1 August 1435–14 August 1522: 1 de agosto de 1435–14 de agosto de 1522
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1435, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Milbourne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Baskerville em 1460, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire родился 1 августа 1435 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Milbourne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Anne Devereux, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Baskerville в 1460 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 12 дочерей. Он умер 14 августа 1522 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия.

sm.1482- 1483: mai le 1482 e o'o I le 1483

es.1 August 1435–14 August 1522: 1 de agosto de 1435–14 de agosto de 1522
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire nació el 1 de agosto de 1435, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Milbourne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Jane Baskerville en 1460, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
